exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your downsizing decisions forward
items: Measure and document all storage and closet dimensions in your current home versus your planned new living space
Create a detailed room-by-room map showing exactly which furniture and belongings will fit in each area of your new living space
Calculate the true costs of your downsizing move including all associated fees and expenses
Identify and prioritize the key motivations and goals driving your downsizing decision
Research and schedule consultations with 3 different downsizing professionals or services in your area
Create a detailed timeline for your downsizing process with specific milestones and deadlines
